name: E2-US1: FastAPI Server Setup
desc:
## Goal
Set up the FastAPI server that hosts the map generation API endpoints.

## Requirements
- Create poster-generator/api/ directory with main.py and equirements.txt`n- FastAPI app with CORS configured for the storefront domain
- Health check endpoint: GET /health ? returns {"status": "ok", "timestamp": ...}
- Configurable port via PORT env var (default: 8000)
- Run command: uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port `n- Auto-restart on file change in dev
- Request logging middleware

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] GET /health returns 200 with {"status": "ok"}
- [ ] CORS allows requests from the storefront URL
- [ ] Server starts without errors
- [ ] PORT environment variable is respected

## File Context
- New: poster-generator/api/main.py
- New: poster-generator/api/requirements.txt

## What NOT to do
- Do not expose any sensitive endpoints without auth
- Do not hardcode PORT - must be env var
- Do not skip CORS setup - storefront needs it
